name: Cheese Sauce, Sans Cheese, Ff
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Instant mashed potatoes (Idahoan brand or boiled)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients to a blender or food processor and blend until smooth.
2. Pour the mixture into a saucepan and heat on medium, stirring continuously until barely boiling and the sauce is thick and smooth.
3. Serve immediately, if not sooner. It's great on anything you'd use a cheese sauce for, or it's even good by itself. If reheating, add a little water first, stir, then heat.
